Expression-only residual baseline & Center/unmasked expression only; no neighbor tokens. & Normalized target expression or task proxy. & -0.211400 & Defines what center expression already explains before neighbor context receives credit. & If the baseline is underfit, context can appear useful; if it is too flexible, it can absorb true neighbor effects. & results/reports/cp\_q6\_benchmark\_matrix/benchmark\_metric\_matrix.csv \\
ContextGate residual delta & Evidence-routed context use; does not spend real context unless strict gates pass. & residual\_delta\_vs\_expression & -0.063000 & Measures whether routed context explains residual target signal beyond expression-only evidence. & A conservative router may abstain from weak real effects that a future stronger model could exploit. & results/reports/cp\_q6\_benchmark\_matrix/benchmark\_metric\_matrix.csv \\
Always-context residual comparator & Center expression plus true-neighbor context for every row. & residual\_delta\_vs\_expression & -0.562100 & Tests whether unconditional context use creates gains or false context when compared with expression-only. & Can overuse spatial context and convert confounded/negative rows into false-context claims. & results/reports/cp\_q6\_benchmark\_matrix/benchmark\_metric\_matrix.csv \\
Wrong-context residual control & Center expression plus random, coordinate-shuffled, or distant neighbor context. & false\_positive\_context\_rate & 0.285300 & Separates physical-neighbor evidence from generic spatial, batch, or sampling artifacts. & If controls are unavailable or mismatched, residual gains may be artifact-sensitive. & results/reports/cp\_q6\_benchmark\_matrix/paired\_method\_tables.csv \\
Residual claim boundary & Registered CP-Q residual/task artifacts only. & strict\_context\_allowed\_count & 0.000000 & Prevents residual hints from being promoted into biological context-benefit claims without full gate support. & This is a benchmark claim boundary, not proof that all biological residual context effects are absent. & results/reports/cp\_q5\_contextgate\_decisions/contextgate\_decisions.csv \\
\bottomrule
